title: lobelia simsii
intro: Lobelia simsii, also known as Chinese Lobelia or Indian Tobacco, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobelia simsii include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Lobelia simsii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a variety of ailments, including coughs and colds.
